description: Product Description Love Dance & Love S.lemon S.lemon is an enterprising brand of indoor sports products. As an original brand, we reaffirm that all products are produced in a regulated and ethical factory. Our mission is to research and design exquisite model, use genuine and healthy materials to make professional products for our customers. s.lemon Ballet Shoe for Toddler,Kids,Adult,Double Layer Canvas Design Your Trusted Partner in Dance Life This canvas ballet shoe are design for beginner ballerina,it's perfect for ballet,gymnastics,scottish highland dance. Size arange from kids to adult, Toddler size : 7 UK Child - 13 UK Child. Big Kids size : 1UK-3UK Adult size: 4UK-9.5 UK Please check our size chart before ordering,suggest order 1 sizes up than normal shoes. Suggest One Size Up Than Street Shoes. 100% Cotton Canvas, Soft & Comforty. Handmade Rounder Toe Pleat: Reduces Stress on the Toes. Leather Split Sole:Durable and Wearable.
